args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND (lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%') OR (lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%') ;

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street hype%' OR lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND (lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' OR lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%') OR (lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe maginnis%') ;

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,13758,14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id IN (4122,4628,13758,14080) GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;
